title: Overgrown Flowery Cursors
description: Flowery cursors for your favorite flowery GUI!
body:
Flowery cursors made to match the [Overgrown Flowery GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overgrown-flowery-gui)! These are heavily based off the cursors that come with the [Overgrown Flowery Interface](https://www.nexusmods.com/stardewvalley/mods/6166) for Stardew Valley.

## 🌸 Dependencies
Requires the [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod.

## 🌸 Version Support
- Version **1.0.0** of the pack will work **up to version 1.21.8**.
- Version **1.0.1** of the pack will work for **1.21.9+**.

## 🌸 Notes
- Personal edits for personal use only.
- You are also free to include this in modpacks, I only ask to be credited.


<details>
<summary>Just a bit of rambling</summary>

This is my first ever resource pack! I just love both Overgrown Flowery GUI/Interface so much and I love the cursors that come with the Stardew interface mod, so I decided why not make it match with Overgrown Flowery GUI?

</details>

## 🌸 Credits
- [SugarSugarRuin](https://forums.nexusmods.com/profile/83494008-sugarsugarruin/) whose cursors I heavily based this on
- KChem for the Overgrown Flowery GUI

See Gallery for preview. 🌸
